metadata.title: Raghvendra Singh - AI Engineer & Full Stack Software Engineer
metadata.description: AI Engineer and Full Stack Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience building AI-native applications, multi-agent systems, RAG pipelines, and scalable SaaS products using React, FastAPI, NestJS, Python, TypeScript, LangGraph, and modern cloud technologies.
metadata.creator: Raghvendra Singh

about.title: About
bullets: **4+ years of experience** in AI and Full-Stack Software Engineering.
Built **3+ AI-powered applications** using modern AI technologies.
Worked on **4 production-grade SaaS applications** from development to deployment.
Built **10+ personal projects** across AI, full-stack, and cloud technologies.
**Master of Computer Applications (MCA), completed in May 2026**.
Open Source Contributor to **GirlScript Summer of Code (GSSoC)** and **Hacktoberfest 2021**.

skills.subtitle: My Expertise
skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.description: Building AI-native applications, scalable backend systems, and modern full-stack products.

experience.subtitle: My Work
experience.title: Experience
experience.description: Here's a summary of my professional journey and educational background in software development.

description.textBeforeLink: Let's connect! Feel free to reach out
description.textAfterLink: or I'll get back to you as soon as I can.

experience.title: Master of Computer Applications
desc: Coursework: Software Engineering, AI & ML, Data Structure Design and Analysis of Algorithms
experience.company: Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam Technical University, Lucknow

experience.title: Software Engineer 1
desc: Worked as a Full Stack Engineer, building APIs and documentation for Auzmor (an Employee Experience platform).
Co-developed the Reveal application — a survey-based management tool — from scratch, covering both frontend and backend.

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer
desc: Contributed to the Freshflows team (B2B SaaS product) by developing user interfaces and components.
Integrated backend APIs to deliver seamless product functionality.

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
desc: Developed an Employee Time Tracking web application using React, Express.js, Node.js, and MongoDB.
Enabled employees to log work hours and provide detailed descriptions of tasks performed.

experience.title: Magazine3 Technologies
desc: Enhanced website performance and user experience by optimizing Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, TTFB).
Implemented image optimization, caching strategies, and code minification, achieving high PageSpeed and Lighthouse scores.

projects.title: NutriAI — AI Nutrition & Fitness Tracker
projects.description: An AI-powered nutrition and fitness mobile app using LangGraph-based multi-agent workflows and RAG to generate personalized meal and fitness plans with safety validation.

projects.title: ResearchMind — Multi-Agent AI Research System
projects.description: A multi-agent AI research platform coordinating planning, retrieval, reasoning, and report generation using LangChain, OpenAI, Tavily Search, and Streamlit.

projects.title: StudySurf — AI Learning Platform
projects.description: A 7-agent AI learning platform that converts educational videos into personalized summaries, quizzes, visualizations, and multilingual learning content using Gemini and FastAPI.

projects.title: ReadList - A blog web app
projects.description: ReadList is a blogging platform where users can share written content and ideas. This app allows readers to read, like, comment, and share on other platforms and social media.

projects.title: Votify - A mobile voting app
projects.description: A high-performance mobile voting application designed for speed, security, and simplicity. Votify leverages modern web technologies to provide a reliable voting experience.

projects.title: InterCup - An interview preparation app
projects.description: InterCup is an interview preparation app that helps users prepare for interviews by providing a platform to practice and track their progress.

projects.title: Anonymous Message
projects.description: Built an anonymous messaging platform with Next.js, MongoDB, NextAuth, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI for secure send/receive interactions.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A personal portfolio website built with Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS, featuring advanced animations and a modern UI.

projects.title: Bulletin Board - Task Management App
projects.description: A Kanban-style task management app for individuals, with drag-and-drop cards, and user authentication.

certifications.title: Linux Administration Bootcamp: Go from Beginner to Advanced
Responsive Website Basics: Code with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
